/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/RoTrade.dir/cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RoTrade.dir/data_query.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RoTrade.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RoTrade.dir/trade_ads.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RoTrade.dir/trade_eval.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RoTrade.dir/trade_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RoTrade.dir/web_scraper.cpp.o -o RoTrade  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgumbo.so
